args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $env:TEST_INHERIT='SYN768_HAPPY'; $keys=@('PATHEXT','ComSpec','windir','SystemRoot','LOCALAPPDATA','APPDATA','ProgramFiles','ProgramData','PATH'); foreach($k in $keys){ $v=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable($k,'Process'); "ENV|$k|$v" }; foreach($name in @('cmd','powershell','ssh')) { $cmd=Get-Command $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "RESOLVE|$name|$($cmd.Source)" }; $childPs=& powershell -NoProfile -Command '[Console]::Out.Write($env:TEST_INHERIT)'; $childCmd=& cmd /d /c 'echo %TEST_INHERIT%'; $childWhere=& where.exe cmd.exe; "NESTED_PS|$childPs"; "NESTED_CMD|$($childCmd.Trim())"; "NESTED_WHERE_CMD|$($childWhere -join ';')"; "EXPECT|TEST_INHERIT|SYN768_HAPPY"

details.message: act_run_shell command must not be empty

args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $env:SYN770_PARENT='SYN770_PARENT_VALUE'; "CASE|happy"; foreach($k in @('PATHEXT','ComSpec','PATH')){ "ENV|$k|$([Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable($k,'Process'))" }; $childPs=& powershell -NoProfile -Command '[Console]::Out.Write($env:SYN770_PARENT)'; $childCmd=& cmd /d /c 'echo %SYN770_PARENT%'; $whereCmd=@(& where.exe cmd.exe); "PS_CHILD|$childPs"; "CMD_CHILD|$($childCmd.Trim())"; "WHERE_COUNT|$($whereCmd.Count)"; "WHERE_FIRST|$($whereCmd[0])"; "EXPECT|SYN770_PARENT|SYN770_PARENT_VALUE"; if($childPs -ne 'SYN770_PARENT_VALUE'){ throw 'nested PowerShell env/output mismatch' }; if($childCmd.Trim() -ne 'SYN770_PARENT_VALUE'){ throw 'nested cmd env/output mismatch' }; if(-not $whereCmd -or $whereCmd[0] -notmatch 'cmd\.exe$'){ throw 'where.exe cmd resolution mismatch' }

$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; "CASE|edge_nested_output_volume"; $lines=@(& cmd /d /c 'for /L %i in (1,1,64) do @echo SYN770_LINE_%i'); "COUNT|$($lines.Count)"; "FIRST|$($lines[0])"; "LAST|$($lines[-1])"; "EXPECT|count|64"; if($lines.Count -ne 64){ throw "nested cmd output count mismatch: $($lines.Count)" }; if($lines[0] -ne 'SYN770_LINE_1'){ throw 'nested cmd first line mismatch' }; if($lines[-1] -ne 'SYN770_LINE_64'){ throw 'nested cmd last line mismatch' }

details.message: act_run_shell command must be an executable path/name only; pass flags and shell snippets in args
act_run_shell command must be an unquoted executable path/name; pass arguments separately in args
